title: Safari Adventure: African Wildlife Coloring
description: Explore the exciting world of African safari animals through this detailed coloring page featuring elephants, lions, and giraffes in their natural habitat.
instructions: Color each animal using realistic colors or your imagination! Use the learning facts at the bottom to help you understand these amazing animals better.

content.image: A savanna scene with a family of elephants near a watering hole, a pride of lions resting under an acacia tree, and a tower of giraffes reaching for leaves in the distance. The background includes baobab trees, tall grass, and a setting sun.
learningFacts: Elephants can live up to 70 years and communicate through rumbling sounds that can travel long distances
Lions are the only cats that live in groups called prides
Giraffes have unique spotted patterns - no two giraffes have exactly the same pattern
African elephants have larger ears than Asian elephants, shaped like the continent of Africa
A giraffe's neck has the same number of vertebrae (seven) as humans, just much longer ones
